creator: rmorgan@portmorgan.com
text:
Good news, but a little bit embarrassing.  After Daniel's patches to libwebsockets and to mosquitto, the port works as expected.

I had caused some of my issues by having an extra 'protocol' entry in the mosquitto.conf.  If you have "protocol mqtt" entry AFTER the "protocol websockets", it overwrites the "protocol websockets".

The changes to libwebsockets were definitely needed, but I can't honestly say the patch to mosquitto was required.

Regardless, it works and I appreciate the work Daniel did.
